payload.compiled_summary: ParaView: review Probe ParaView through artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for ParaView. Checklist ParaView pack links to the intended environment spec(s), ParaView adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, ParaView anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using ParaView for using paraview as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside workflow coupling and cross-runtime integration., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for ParaView without a typed contract tied to paraview executable workflows for workflow coupling and cross-runtime integration.. Healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker. Runtime eng-paraview/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-paraview:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/2217364c-bd8c-53be-b282-1be083e9ef04.
